question: Which flight numbers correspond to United Airlines flights?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.FlightNo FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRLINES AS T2 ON T2.uid  =  T1.Airline WHERE T2.Airline  =  "United Airlines"
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.attr_6d8380 FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airlines AS T2 ON T1.attr_6d2f2f = T2.attr_6d2f2f WHERE T2.attr_9871d3 = 'United Airlines'
raw_response: SELECT T1.attr_6d8380 FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airlines AS T2 ON T1.attr_6d2f2f = T2.attr_6d2f2f WHERE T2.attr_9871d3 = 'United Airlines'
